description_long: This is a woven straw fedora hat featuring a natural tan color with a subtle checkered pattern throughout the surface. The hat has a classic pinched front crown and a gently sloped, narrow brim that encircles the base. A wide, black fabric band wraps around the lower part of the crown, adding a touch of contrast and style. The weave of the straw is tight and uniform, giving the hat a semi-soft but structured appearance. The interior is likely lined with a thin fabric or left as bare straw, providing breathability. This hat is lightweight and designed for casual or semi-formal urban wear, offering both sun protection and a fashionable accent.
description: A tan woven straw fedora hat with a black fabric band, featuring a pinched crown and a narrow, gently sloped brim.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pinched crown, the black band, and the slightly upturned brim on the left side.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the back curve of the brim and the continuous black band.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back of the crown and the neat overlap of the black band.
description_view_3: Right-front view emphasizing the pinched front crown and the forward slope of the brim.
attribute_crown_shape: pinched front, medium height, indented crown
